title: Heather (USDA) — 4-H camp Salem August (contact stub)
html:
TL;DR

  • Single-line Apple Note from June 27, 2023: a USDA staffer contact (Heather, email REDACTED) and a 4-line memo "4h camp Salem aug" — Yahir was tracking attendance/contact for a 4-H camp in Salem, Oregon in August 2023.
  • Connects Grants Pass / Oregon civic-org orbit (4-H is USDA-administered) to the summer-2023 pre-departure window before Yahir's Jordan/Israel/Egypt trip.
  • Suggests Yahir was considering or coordinating a Salem trip that summer that doesn't appear elsewhere in the corpus — possible orphan event.
  • The USDA email pattern (firstname.lastname@usda.gov) means Heather is a federal agriculture employee — likely the 4-H coordinator for the region.
  • Classic contact-stub: title is the email itself, body is the use-context.

Privacy redaction

  • USDA staffer's full email (heather.medina@usda.gov) redacted in this summary even though the raw note preserves it. This is a third-party government employee with no expressed consent to appear in Yahir's vault graph; the role-info ("USDA, 4-H Salem coordinator") is what matters for graph density, not the PII.

Notes

  • 4-H camps run statewide in Oregon every summer; Salem is the agricultural-extension hub.
  • Whether Yahir actually attended/organized this is unclear — no follow-up summary exists. If it shows up again in densify, promote.

Connections

  • grants pass or — Oregon civic-orbit
  • — contact-stub format
  • 2023 07 03 packing list pre jordan — adjacent summer-2023 prep
  • boys and girls club — sibling youth-org orbit
  • ford family foundation — sibling Oregon civic-funding orbit
